title: hieracium ausugum
intro: Hieracium ausugum, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Hieracium ausugum include its ability to support immune function, reduce oxidative stress, and act as an antioxidant. Hieracium ausugum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, and internally to support overall well-being.
